notes: Manual state/territory profile scaffold compiled only from loaded official-source envelopes and methodology notes. It is qualitative context plus links to verified production, royalty, petroleum object-count and source-gate envelopes; it does not allocate Commonwealth tax by state.
source_rights: Project metadata/prose CC BY 4.0; upstream source rights remain with DCCEEW, Geoscience Australia, NOPTA, WA Government, Queensland Government and Commonwealth Budget sources.
citation: Fuel Resilience AU state petroleum ledger methodology; DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics 2025; Geoscience Australia AECR 2025; NOPTA spatial data; WA and Queensland budget/royalty sources.

fields.method: State roles are descriptive and anchored to loaded official production, royalty, petroleum object-count, source-gate and policy envelopes. Federal tax allocation remains unavailable unless a source publishes state-attributable Commonwealth receipts.

states.primary_role: North-west oil, condensate, conventional gas and LNG export hub.
states.production_role: Largest loaded state/territory oil and gas production role in the AES state rows.
states.refining_role: No loaded refinery count is published on this page.
states.import_role: Major export and import/storage infrastructure context; terminal capacity is not loaded.
infrastructure_summary: North West Shelf conventional gas and liquid hydrocarbon context
Northern Carnarvon, Browse and Bonaparte basin context in AECR
WA petroleum state component royalty and North West Shelf grant receipt line loaded
states.federal_tax_note: Loaded Commonwealth resource-rent and PRRT policy envelopes are national/project concepts, not WA-attributed receipt rows.
states.project_count_status: Unavailable - no current official project-count export is loaded.
states.permit_count_status: Partial - NOPTA current offshore title/permit records are loaded; onshore/state title systems are not complete.
states.production_mapping_status: Partial - AES state rows and AECR basin context are loaded; project/company production remains unavailable.
states.notes: Strongest loaded state coverage because production and WA petroleum/NWS receipt context are both present.

federal_revenue_boundary.reason: Loaded Commonwealth sources do not provide defensible state-level allocation. Allocating by production, company address, project location or consumption would be a model, not an observed public receipt.

not_captured: state-by-state fuel excise or GST attribution
gas processing plant counts by state
raw site counts without an official definition
